items.name: workspace
items.title: Workspace
items.description: Self-contained workspace with tab-based panels: closing a panel's last tab collapses the panel; closing all panels reveals a configurable fallback. Exposes useWorkspace context and a WorkspaceHandle ref for programmatic control. Bundles its internal tab strip and drag context.

items.name: page
items.title: Page
items.description: Page shell with an optional header (title/subtitle, breadcrumbs, visual, badge, actions) and a content area that can be padded.

items.name: password-input
items.title: Password Input
items.description: Password field with a show/hide visibility toggle and an optional live strength meter. Exports a scorePassword heuristic. Wraps InputGroup; works controlled or uncontrolled.

items.name: payroll-run
items.title: Payroll Run
items.description: Payroll run summary with per-employee payslips — gross, deductions, and net pay.

items.name: payroll-tasks
items.title: Payroll Tasks
items.description: Employee payroll task dashboard — pending/overdue/completed overview cards, a searchable task list, and a complete-with-summary dialog.

items.name: payslip-detail
items.title: Payslip Detail
items.description: Single-employee payslip breakdown — earnings, deductions, and employer contributions with YTD totals.

items.name: data-table
items.title: Data Table
items.description: Generic TanStack data table — sortable columns, column filter, column visibility, row selection, and pagination.

items.name: bulk-actions-toolbar
items.title: Bulk Actions Toolbar
items.description: Row selection with select-all and a contextual toolbar for bulk export/delete, with a confirm dialog for the destructive action.

items.name: confirm-dialog
items.title: Confirm Dialog
items.description: Reusable confirm-before-you-act dialog for destructive actions — controlled open state, custom title/description/labels, destructive styling.

items.name: search-filter-bar
items.title: Search + Filter Bar
items.description: Search box with faceted Select filters and a clear-all action over a filtered result list with live count.

items.name: detail-tabs
items.title: Detail Tabs
items.description: Single-record detail view with a header and Overview / Activity / Orders tabs.

items.name: record-form-dialog
items.title: Record Form Dialog
items.description: Standalone create/edit dialog — one form handles both add and update, seeded from the record being edited.

items.name: record-detail
items.title: Record Detail
items.description: Read-only single-record view — header with avatar/status badge and grouped label/value field sections, no tabs.

items.name: master-detail
items.title: Master-Detail
items.description: Resizable list + detail split pane — select a row on the left to view its fields on the right, with an empty state when nothing's selected.

items.name: department
items.title: Department
items.description: Departments table with create/edit dialog form, row-action menu, and a delete confirmation.

items.name: employee
items.title: Employee
items.description: Employee directory with create/edit dialog form, row-action menu, and a delete confirmation.

items.name: deductions-benefits
items.title: Deductions & Benefits
items.description: Deduction and benefit plan list with create/edit dialog form, row-action menu, and a delete confirmation.

items.name: tax-tables
items.title: Tax Tables
items.description: Searchable tax bracket reference table filterable by jurisdiction, with income range and rate per filing status.

items.name: import-export
items.title: Import / Export
items.description: CSV import wizard — paste or load data, map columns to entity fields with a live preview, then import. Includes a CSV export action.

items.name: file-upload
items.title: File Upload
items.description: Attachments panel — click-or-drag dropzone, per-file upload/error states, type icons, retry, and remove.

items.name: notifications-inbox
items.title: Notifications Inbox
items.description: Notification inbox with All/Unread tabs, per-type icons, unread indicators, mark-one-read on click, and mark-all-read.

items.name: comments-thread
items.title: Comments Thread
items.description: Threaded comments with avatars, inline reply composers, and a top-level composer, with a running comment count.

items.name: audit-log
items.title: Audit Log
items.description: Field-level audit trail — who changed what field, with before → after values, actor avatars, and search/action filters.

items.name: compensation-table
items.title: Compensation Table
items.description: Searchable org-wide salary overview with pay band, last adjustment, and change percentage.

items.name: payroll-calendar
items.title: Payroll Calendar
items.description: Monthly pay schedule with timesheet cutoffs, pay dates, and the next upcoming run highlighted.

items.name: offcycle-payment-form
items.title: Off-cycle Payment Form
items.description: Form for issuing a one-off bonus, correction, or reimbursement outside the regular payroll run.

items.name: dashboard-01
items.title: Dashboard 01
items.description: Collapsible sidebar nav paired with the Workspace component. Sidebar items open tabs; repeat clicks focus the existing tab.

items.name: dashboard
items.title: Dashboard
items.description: Icon-collapsible sidebar (trigger lives in the sidebar) paired with the Workspace component; each tab renders inside the Page component.

items.name: activity-log
items.title: Activity Log
items.description: Filterable activity log with a responsive datatable — collapses to cards on narrow panes.

items.name: activity-feed
items.title: Activity Feed
items.description: Grouped activity timeline with type/user filters and running stats.

items.name: access-control
items.title: Access Control
items.description: Manage role permissions across resources with a per-role permission matrix.

items.name: invoice-detail
items.title: Invoice Detail
items.description: Master-detail invoice workspace — select a row to open its line items in a new tab.

items.name: purchase-order-form
items.title: Purchase Order Form
items.description: Three-step wizard for creating a purchase order — vendor details, line items, and review.

items.name: chart-of-accounts
items.title: Chart of Accounts
items.description: Chart of accounts table with create/edit dialog form, row-action menu, and a delete confirmation.

items.name: products
items.title: Products
items.description: Product / SKU catalog list with create/edit dialog form, row-action menu, and a delete confirmation.

items.name: warehouses
items.title: Warehouses
items.description: Warehouse list with capacity utilization, create/edit dialog form, row-action menu, and a delete confirmation.

items.name: stock-levels
items.title: Stock Levels
items.description: On-hand stock per SKU and warehouse — searchable, with derived low/out-of-stock badges and a stock-take adjustment dialog.

items.name: stock-movements
items.title: Stock Movements
items.description: Append-only stock ledger — receipts, shipments, adjustments, and transfers with a type filter, running net change, and a record-movement dialog.

items.name: leads
items.title: Leads
items.description: Lead pipeline with a stage filter, hot-lead scoring, qualification rate, and a convert action gated on the lead being qualified.

items.name: project-team
items.title: Project Team
items.description: Project roster with roles, weekly allocation, and guards that keep one lead on the project and nobody booked past a full week.

items.name: milestones
items.title: Milestones
items.description: Milestone tracker with task-scope progress and a state derived from the due date — completed, overdue, at risk, or on track.

items.name: timesheets
items.title: Timesheets
items.description: Time entries per project with billable-utilization summary and a draft → submitted → approved lifecycle that locks an entry once submitted.

items.name: task-board
items.title: Task Board
items.description: Drag-and-drop Kanban board for project tasks — to do / in progress / review / done, with priority, assignee, and a create/edit dialog.

items.name: projects
items.title: Projects
items.description: Project portfolio list with a status filter, progress bars, overdue due-date highlighting, and create/edit/delete.

items.name: performance-reviews
items.title: Performance Reviews
items.description: Performance review list with star ratings, a status filter, average-rating summary, and a create/edit dialog that blocks completing an unrated review.

items.name: attendance
items.title: Attendance
items.description: Daily attendance log with a date filter, punch-derived present/late/absent status, total hours, and create/edit/delete.

items.name: leave-requests
items.title: Leave Requests
items.description: Leave request list with a status filter, approve/reject row actions, a submit-request dialog, and a delete confirmation.

items.name: bills
items.title: Bills
items.description: Accounts-payable bills list with create/edit dialog form, row-action menu, and a delete confirmation.

items.name: payments
items.title: Payments
items.description: Payments list with create/edit dialog form, row-action menu, and a delete confirmation.

items.name: journal-entries
items.title: Journal Entries
items.description: Journal entry list with a dynamic debit/credit line-item dialog that validates the entry balances before it can be saved.

items.name: bank-reconciliation
items.title: Bank Reconciliation
items.description: Bank reconciliation checklist — mark transactions cleared against a statement balance, with live statement/cleared/difference summary cards.

items.name: approval-board
items.title: Approval Board
items.description: Drag-and-drop Kanban board for triaging expense, purchase order, and time-off approval requests.

items.name: account-locked
items.title: Account Locked
items.description: Account-locked screen after too many failed sign-in attempts — shows the locked email, a lockout countdown, and reset/support actions.

items.name: session-expired
items.title: Session Expired
items.description: Re-authentication prompt after an idle timeout — quick password re-entry for the current user, incorrect-password error, and a switch-user action.

items.name: login
items.title: Login
items.description: Email and password sign-in form — inline field validation, invalid-credentials banner, pending state, remember-me, and forgot-password/sign-up links.

items.name: login-social
items.title: Login (Social)
items.description: Sign-in with Google/GitHub SSO buttons over an email-and-password form — provider divider, inline validation, invalid-credentials banner, and pending state.

items.name: magic-link-sent
items.title: Magic Link Sent
items.description: Passwordless check-your-email confirmation after requesting a magic sign-in link — expiry note, cooldown-gated resend, and change-email action.

items.name: register
items.title: Register
items.description: Account sign-up form with a live password-strength meter, field validation, terms agreement, and a verify-your-email confirmation state.

items.name: verify-email
items.title: Verify Email
items.description: Post-registration confirm-your-email pending screen — cooldown-gated resend and a transition to the email-confirmed success state.

items.name: otp-verify
items.title: OTP Verify
items.description: One-time passcode entry with a 6-digit segmented input, auto-verify on complete, incorrect-code error, and a countdown-gated resend.

items.name: two-factor-challenge
items.title: Two-Factor Challenge
items.description: Post-password 2FA step — authenticator-app code entry with auto-verify, a recovery-code fallback, trust-this-device option, and error states.

items.name: two-factor-setup
items.title: Two-Factor Setup
items.description: Authenticator enrollment — QR code, copyable manual setup key, and a 6-digit verify step with error and enabled states.

items.name: recovery-codes
items.title: Recovery Codes
items.description: Backup-code display with copy, download, and regenerate actions, gated behind an "I've saved them" acknowledgement before continuing.

items.name: forgot-password
items.title: Forgot Password
items.description: Request a password-reset link by email — field validation, pending state, and a neutral check-your-email confirmation that doesn't leak account existence.

items.name: reset-password
items.title: Reset Password
items.description: Set-a-new-password form with a live strength meter, confirm-match validation, an expired-link state, and a password-updated confirmation.

items.name: change-password
items.title: Change Password
items.description: Authenticated in-app password change — current-password re-auth check, new-password strength meter, confirm-match validation, and a changed confirmation.

items.name: unauthorized-403
items.title: Unauthorized 403
items.description: Signed-in-but-forbidden screen — explains the missing permission, offers a request-access action with a sent confirmation, and a back link.

items.name: upgrade-required
items.title: Upgrade Required
items.description: Plan-gated feature screen — a signed-in user hits a Pro-only feature, with the perks it unlocks, an upgrade action, and an ask-an-admin fallback that confirms once sent.

items.name: forbidden-workspace
items.title: Forbidden Workspace
items.description: Wrong-tenant screen — signed in but not a member of this workspace, with a switcher to workspaces you belong to and a switch-account action.

items.name: pending-approval
items.title: Pending Approval
items.description: Account-under-review status screen — explains the pending admin approval, the notification email, and check-status/sign-out actions.

items.name: account-suspended
items.title: Account Suspended
items.description: Suspended-account screen — shows the suspension reason and offers an appeal action with a submitted confirmation plus a contact-support link.

items.name: settings
items.title: Settings
items.description: Sectioned workspace settings — company profile, notifications, billing, and security.
